sys_ui_page.description:
New UI Page to prompt from Platform about re-opening completed or cancelled tasks
2.7.0 | 2021-09-14 | mmcc | STRY0099532 - DIA- 'Mass Reopen' Task Tree Modal (MVP) Created UI Page for Reopen Tasks. <input> id="tasksByDate" get disabled when closed_at is empty for selected task. Button id="submit" gets enabled after clicking a radio button. Updated styleSheets array to use tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages. Changed CSS Selector .dtech-perm-delete to use .dtech-standard-text-color. Changed sub-tasks to subtask.
sys_ui_page.html:
var styleSheets = []; styleSheets.push("tasker-modal-prompt-UIPages.css"); var linkTags = []; for (var sheet in styleSheets) { var css = new GlideRecord("content_css"); css.addQuery("name", styleSheets[sheet]); css.query(); css.next(); linkTags.push(css.sys_id+".cssdbx?ver="+css.sys_updated_on); } Tasker - Please choose to reopen only the top task or all of the subtasks Tasker - Button - Confirm Tasker - This Task Only Tasker - Open this Task and all subtasks Tasker - This Task and all subtasks closed on or after var closedAt = ''; var taskSys_id = jelly.jvar_taskSysId; var grTask = new GlideRecord('x_153465_discovert_route_task_instance'); grTask.addQuery('sys_id', taskSys_id); grTask.query(); if (grTask.next()) { closedAt = grTask.getDisplayValue('closed_at'); } closedAt;
${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Please choose to reopen only the top task or all of the subtasks')}




${gs.getMessage('cancel')} ${gs.getMessage('Tasker - Button - Confirm')}
sys_ui_page.name: reopen_task_prompt
